title: nautilocalyx cordatus
intro: Nautilocalyx cordatus is a species of flowering plant in the family Boraginaceae, commonly known as the "tree bennet" due to its unique tree-like habit. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Nautilocalyx cordatus include the relief of respiratory issues, such as asthma and bronchitis, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve cardiovascular health. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as infusions and decoctions, are commonly used in traditional medicine, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
